name: test_patch_vs_put_difference
description:
Demonstrates PUT vs PATCH distinction:
        - PUT  : sends full payload {"name": ..., "job": ...}
        - PATCH: sends partial payload {"job": ...} only
        Both return 200, but PATCH only carries the changed field.
descriptionHtml:
Demonstrates PUT vs PATCH distinction:
    - PUT  : sends full payload {"name": ..., "job": ...}
    - PATCH: sends partial payload {"job": ...} only
    Both return 200, but PATCH only carries the changed field.
statusTrace:
tests/test_users.py:304: in test_patch_vs_put_difference
    assert put_response.status_code == 200
E   assert 429 == 200
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
